untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'put/call ratio from option open buy volume' which is not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal depends on options market data (put/call ratio) that is not provided by standard OHLCV indicators. Vol_ratio_20 was used as a proxy attempt but does not accurately represent the put/call ratio concept from the original signal.
translation_notes: The original signal requires calculating and monitoring put/call ratios from options open interest/volume data, which is outside the scope of the allowed technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, volume ratios, z-scores, and bar properties). A proper implementation would require access to options chain data. The holding period of 1 day is correctly captured in hold_days_max.
